name: PERITONSILLAR ABSCESS
definition: complication of untreated / incompletely treated tonsillitis

demographics.Prevalence: ⅓ of all soft-tissue abscesses of head & neck

discriminating_features: tonsillar enlargement: √ "kissing tonsils" = medial apposition of enlarged tonsils
linear striated enhancement of palatine tonsil + posterior pharyngeal soft tissue

general: tonsillar enlargement: √ "kissing tonsils" = medial apposition of enlarged tonsils
linear striated enhancement of palatine tonsil + posterior pharyngeal soft tissue
